events.text: Assessed the panelboard as rough-complete (~70%) but failing due to the missing panel schedule, which violates NEC 408.4(A) and blocks verification of 110.26 clearance and 200.4 neutral identification. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: medium` (mislabeled/undocumented circuits pose shock hazard to future maintenance), with corrective actions (build schedule, verify clearances/labeling, re-inspect) written to `/app/answer.json`.
